channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Military apprehends ISWAP teenage courier involved in Jilli area attacks
item.description: Troops from Operation Hadin Kai (OPHK) don arrest 15-year-old wey dey suspected to be ISWAP logistics courier for Ngamdu, Borno State. The pikin bin dey try collect supplies for insurgents wey dey ope...

item.title: Péter Magyar and Tisza end Viktor Orbán’s 16-year rule with sweeping two-thirds majority in Hungary
item.description: Hungary witnessed a historic political shift on Sunday as Péter Magyar’s Tisza party defeated Viktor Orbán’s long-ruling Fidesz, marking the end of a 16-year conservative government. With nearly all v...

item.title: Brampton man charged following hit-and-run collision in Etobicoke
item.description: A man from Brampton is facing multiple charges after allegedly fleeing the scene of a hit-and-run collision in Etobicoke, Toronto. According to Toronto Police Service, the incident occurred in the Eto...

item.title: Toronto Raptors set for decisive regular-season finale against Brooklyn Nets
item.description: The Toronto Raptors are heading into their regular-season finale with nearly their entire roster available as they face the Brooklyn Nets in a game that will determine their playoff fate. According to...

item.title: Charl Schwartzel reflects on challenging Masters round and the need for mental rest
item.description: Charl Schwartzel, the 41-year-old South African golfer and 2011 Masters champion, expressed after his final round at Augusta National that he needs a mental break from the tournament. Starting as the ...

item.title: Joe Rogan and Donald Trump meet at UFC 327 despite prior criticism
item.description: Donald Trump and Joe Rogan were seen together at UFC 327 in Miami, despite the podcaster's recent criticisms of the former president. Trump attended the event with UFC CEO Dana White and approached Ro...

item.title: Analysis of Arsenal and Manchester City’s Remaining Matches in the Premier League
item.description: The 2025/2026 Premier League title race is heating up as Manchester City closed the gap on Arsenal after their win against Chelsea. Arsenal lost to Bournemouth over the weekend, allowing City to reduc...

item.title: Lis Sam’s Dreamlike Butterfly-Inspired Portraits
item.description: Lis Sam’s art series, 'Blossoming Girls,' presents a mesmerizing exploration of transformation through portraiture. The portraits are composed of faces intertwined with swarms of butterflies, petals, ...

item.title: IT System Failure Paralyzes Mississippi’s Liquor Distribution
item.description: In early 2026, Mississippi faced a statewide liquor shortage following a failed IT system upgrade at its sole alcohol distribution warehouse. The warehouse, operated by a private contractor, handles a...

item.title: Sundowns take crucial away win in Tunis ahead of Champions League semifinal second leg
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns are on the cusp of making history with a second consecutive CAF Champions League final appearance after a solid 1-0 away win against Espérance Tunis at Stade Olympique Hammadi Agrebi...

item.title: How Celebrities Like Amber Ray and Diana Marua Support Kenyan Comedians Financially
item.description: The article from Nation Africa explores how local celebrities such as Amber Ray and Diana Marua are using their fame and fortune to support Kenyan comedians. It looks at the growing culture of ‘soft l...

item.title: Analysis of Identity Politics in Asansol During Bengal Poll Season
item.description: The article discusses the increasing influence of identity politics in Asansol, a key coal belt region in West Bengal, as the state prepares for upcoming elections. It highlights how caste and communi...

item.title: BINI's Performance at Coachella Highlights the Global Reach of Filipino Culture
item.description: Filipino girl group BINI's participation in Coachella 2026 is more than just a musical milestone; it marks a significant cultural moment for the Philippines. As one of the few Filipino acts to perform...

item.title: The cultural legacy and myths surrounding Tabitha Muthike in Machakos
item.description: In Machakos County, stories about Tabitha Muthike remain alive decades after her passing. Locals still talk about her mysterious abilities and the shrines said to hold her spirit. According to the eld...

item.title: Heart Evangelista Represents the Philippines at Shanghai Fashion Week 2026
item.description: Kapuso actress Heart Evangelista wowed attendees and fashion enthusiasts at Shanghai Fashion Week 2026. The event, held earlier this month, showcased some of the most cutting-edge designs and trends f...

item.title: Rory McIlroy takes two-shot lead at the Masters with key birdie
item.description: Rory McIlroy has surged to a two-shot lead at the Masters, thanks to a crucial birdie putt that proved decisive in his round. The Northern Irish golfer displayed remarkable composure under pressure, s...

item.title: YouTuber Stephen McCullagh convicted of murdering pregnant girlfriend Natalie McNally after faking livestream alibi
item.description: Stephen McCullagh, a 36-year-old YouTuber from Northern Ireland, was convicted of murdering his pregnant girlfriend, Natalie McNally, in December 2022. McCullagh meticulously planned the killing, crea...

item.title: Authorities Contain Grass Fire on Mt. Asog in Camarines Sur
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — The grass fire on Mt. Asog, also referred to as Mt. Iriga in Camarines Sur, has been successfully brought under control, according to the Iriga City Environment and Natural Resou...

item.title: Sundowns take crucial first-leg lead against Espérance in Champions League semi-final
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns delivered an impressive performance in the first leg of their CAF Champions League semi-final, defeating Espérance Tunis 1-0 in Radès on Sunday night. Brayan León scored the decisive...

item.title: Tributes Offered to Ali Khamenei at Iran Culture House in Delhi Amid Israel-Iran Tensions
item.description: Reports indicate that tributes were offered to Ali Khamenei at the Iran Culture House in Delhi, coinciding with heightened tensions between Israel and Iran. The incident, which sparked considerable in...
